title: GST intelligence unearths  ₹1,800 crore tax credit fraud
content:
GST intelligence has uncovered a significant financial fraud.
*   The fraud specifically pertains to illicit tax credits.
*   The total value of the unearthed fraud is ₹1,800 crore.

title: Disturbing video surfaces as Klaudia Zakrzewska hit by Gabrielle Carrington Mercedes after clash outside London nightclub
content:
Klaudia Zakrzewska was hit by a Mercedes driven by Gabrielle Carrington.
*   The incident occurred outside a London nightclub, following an earlier clash.
*   A disturbing video of the event has reportedly surfaced.

title: Hi-tech harvester hub scheme: Combine harvesters to be distributed in Mandya
content:
A 'Hi-tech harvester hub scheme' has been initiated.
*   The scheme involves the distribution of combine harvesters.
*   The distribution of these harvesters will take place in Mandya.

title: Election Commission will leave no stone unturned for free, fair and transparent election in West Bengal: CEC
content:
The Chief Election Commissioner (CEC) has affirmed the Election Commission's strong commitment.
*   This commitment is to ensure free, fair, and transparent elections.
*   All necessary efforts will be made for the elections in West Bengal.
